LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Food.descript: Ring for matforsyninger fra Brotherhood of Steel.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Food.label: BoS Food Drop
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Tech_Resource: Ring for Brotherhood of Steel tekniske ressurser og komponenter.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Uniforms.desc: Ring for Brotherhood of Steel standard uniformer.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Weapons.descr: Ring for Brotherhood of Steel standard våpen.
LanguageData.FCP_Permit_BoS_Supply_Drop_Weapons.label: BoS Weapon Drop
